# TYPE rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready gauge
# HELP rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready Messages ready to be delivered to consumers
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{vhost="/",queue="queue1"} 100
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{vhost="/",queue="queue2"} 200
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{vhost="/",queue="queue3"} 0

# TYPE rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_unacked gauge
# HELP rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_unacked Messages delivered to consumers but not yet acknowledged
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_unacked{vhost="/",queue="queue1"} 0
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_unacked{vhost="/",queue="queue2"} 1
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_unacked{vhost="/",queue="queue3"} 2

# TYPE rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages gauge
# HELP rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages Sum of ready and unacknowledged messages - total queue depth
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages{vhost="/",queue="queue1"} 100
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages{vhost="/",queue="queue2"} 201
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages{vhost="/",queue="queue3"} 2

# TYPE rabbitmq_detailed_queue_process_reductions_total counter
# HELP rabbitmq_detailed_queue_process_reductions_total Total number of queue process reductions
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_process_reductions_total{vhost="/",queue="queue1"} 15294
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_process_reductions_total{vhost="/",queue="queue2"} 15475
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_process_reductions_total{vhost="/",queue="queue3"} 15361

# TYPE rabbitmq_detailed_queue_consumers gauge
# HELP rabbitmq_detailed_queue_consumers Consumers on a queue
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_consumers{vhost="/",queue="queue1"} 1
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_consumers{vhost="/",queue="queue2"} 1
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_consumers{vhost="/",queue="queue3"} 1

# TYPE rabbitmq_detailed_queue_info gauge
# HELP rabbitmq_detailed_queue_info A metric with a constant '1' value and labels that provide some queue details
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_info{vhost="/",queue="queue1",queue_type="rabbit_classic_queue",membership="leader"} 1
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_info{vhost="/",queue="queue2",queue_type="rabbit_classic_queue",membership="leader"} 1
rabbitmq_detailed_queue_info{vhost="/",queue="queue3",queue_type="rabbit_classic_queue",membership="leader"} 1

# TYPE rabbitmq_build_info untyped
# HELP rabbitmq_build_info RabbitMQ & Erlang/OTP version info
rabbitmq_build_info{rabbitmq_version="4.2.0",prometheus_plugin_version="4.2.0",prometheus_client_version="5.1.1",erlang_version="27.3.4.6"} 1
# TYPE rabbitmq_identity_info untyped
# HELP rabbitmq_identity_info RabbitMQ node & cluster identity info
rabbitmq_identity_info{rabbitmq_node="rabbit@sas-rabbitmq-server-0.sas-rabbitmq-server.celeborn.svc.cluster.local",rabbitmq_cluster="rabbit@sas-rabbitmq-server-0.sas-rabbitmq-server.celeborn.svc.cluster.local",rabbitmq_cluster_permanent_id="rabbitmq-cluster-id-NgFyAEFN7N9bTUHfvM1Hew",rabbitmq_endpoint="detailed"} 1
# TYPE telemetry_scrape_duration_seconds summary
# HELP telemetry_scrape_duration_seconds Scrape duration
telemetry_scrape_duration_seconds_count{registry="detailed",content_type="text/plain; version=0.0.4"} 1
telemetry_scrape_duration_seconds_sum{registry="detailed",content_type="text/plain; version=0.0.4"} 0.015727908
# TYPE telemetry_scrape_encoded_size_bytes summary
# HELP telemetry_scrape_encoded_size_bytes Scrape size, encoded
# TYPE telemetry_scrape_size_bytes summary
# HELP telemetry_scrape_size_bytes Scrape size, not encoded
telemetry_scrape_size_bytes_count{registry="detailed",content_type="text/plain; version=0.0.4"} 1
telemetry_scrape_size_bytes_sum{registry="detailed",content_type="text/plain; version=0.0.4"} 987
